Home / Services / Storm Damage Repair

Storm Damage Repair

Rapid response to hail, wind, and snow damage across the Front Range.

Colorado's sudden hailstorms and powerful wind events can leave roofs with immediate damage that worsens over time. Our storm response team specializes in assessing and repairing weather-related damage throughout the Denver metro area.

When hail hits neighborhoods like Wash Park or RiNo, we prioritize emergency tarping to prevent water intrusion. For wind-damaged shingles in Lakewood's foothills communities, we perform careful matching of existing materials. We work directly with insurance companies to document all storm-related damage and streamline claims processing.

Our repair approach focuses on restoring your roof's integrity while maintaining its original weather resistance. We replace damaged sections with precision, ensuring new materials blend seamlessly with the existing roof. For historic districts like Littleton's downtown, we source period-appropriate materials when available.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Emergency tarping if active leaks are present
  2. 02 Step 2: Detailed damage documentation for insurance claims
  3. 03 Step 3: Careful removal of compromised materials
  4. 04 Step 4: Precision installation of matching replacement materials

Benefits

  • 24/7 emergency response team
  • Insurance claim assistance
  • Color-matched material replacements
  • Prevention of secondary water damage

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly should I get my roof inspected after a storm?

Within 14 days is ideal, as some insurance policies have reporting deadlines. Early inspection also prevents small problems from becoming major leaks during the next storm.

Will my insurance cover all storm damage repairs?

Most policies cover hail and wind damage, but coverage depends on your deductible and policy terms. We provide thorough documentation to support your claim and can meet with adjusters.

Can small hail damage be repaired without full replacement?

Yes, when damage is limited to a few areas, we can often replace individual shingles or sections. We'll advise if repairs would compromise the roof's overall performance.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with storm damage repair? Contact us today.
